name: international_security_near_miss_marrowbridge_tru_loy
premise: A International Security response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving international security near miss marrowbridge tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before the press briefing. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. Every action is being logged and will be reconstructed in an after-action review. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Ravi Silva
agents.identity: I am Ravi Silva, accountable for a defensible call in International Security when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Nadia Chen
agents.identity: I am Nadia Chen, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in International Security.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before the press briefing. Evidence is partial. Ravi Silva must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Ravi Silva do?
